title.en: Farewell Cape Verde - the underdogs the World Cup will never forget
title.zh-CN: 告别佛得角-世界杯的失败者将永远不会忘记

summary.en: Cape Verde may have been the World Cup's smallest nation but they leave the largest impact as they depart following defeat by defending champions Argentina in an epic.
summary.zh-CN: 佛得角可能是世界杯上最小的国家，但在卫冕冠军阿根廷队失利后，他们的影响最大。

title.en: Five and a half hours that left England's World Cup tie in chaos
title.zh-CN: 让英格兰世界杯比赛陷入混乱的五个半小时

summary.en: For several hours on Friday, no-one seemed to know when England's World Cup last-16 match against co-hosts Mexico would kick off. BBC Sport tells how a story of confusion and anger - culminating in a...
summary.zh-CN: 在周五的几个小时里，似乎没有人知道英格兰世界杯最后16场对阵墨西哥的联合主办方的比赛何时开始。BBC Sport讲述了一个困惑和愤怒的故事，最终导致……

title.en: Argentina overcome Cape Verde in extra-time thriller
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷在加时惊悚片中战胜佛得角

summary.en: Argentina overcome a huge scare as they beat Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time thanks to a deflected header from Cristian Romero to advance to the last 16.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷克服了巨大的恐慌，因为他们在加时赛中以3比2击败佛得角，这要归功于克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗（ Cristian Romero ）的偏转头球晋级到最后16

title.en: 'Sensational' Messi finish gives Argentina the lead
title.zh-CN: “耸人听闻”的梅西决赛让阿根廷领先

summary.en: Lionel Messi hits Argentina's opening goal against Cape Verde with a "sensational" finish in Miami, as he scores in an eighth consecutive World Cup game.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）在迈阿密以“耸人听闻”的成绩击中了阿根廷对佛得角的首个进球，他在连续第八场世界杯比赛中得分。

title.en: 'What a strike!' - Cabral hits brilliant goal to draw Cape Verde level in extra time
title.zh-CN: “真是一场罢工！” -卡布拉尔达到了加时拉平佛得角的辉煌目标

summary.en: Sidny Cabral scores an incredible goal in extra time for Cape Verde as they equalise for a second time against Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 西德尼·卡布拉尔（ Sidny Cabral ）在加时赛中为佛得角队打进了一个令人难以置信的进球，因为他们第二次对阵阿根廷队。

title.en: Argentina stunned as Duarte equalises for Cape Verde
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷震惊，杜阿尔特为佛得角扳平比分

summary.en: Deroy Duarte stuns Argentina as he equalises for Cape Verde during their World Cup round of 32 match in Miami.
summary.zh-CN: 德罗伊·杜阿尔特（ Deroy Duarte ）在迈阿密举行的世界杯32轮比赛中为佛得角扳平比分，震惊了阿根廷。

title.en: Martinez restores Argentina's lead against Cape Verde
title.zh-CN: 马丁内斯恢复阿根廷对佛得角的领先优势

summary.en: Lisandro Martinez restores Argentina's lead against Cape Verde in the knockout stage of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 利桑德罗·马丁内斯在2026年世界杯淘汰赛阶段恢复了阿根廷对佛得角的领先优势。

title.en: England into last 16 - what is their path to the final?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队进入16强-他们进入决赛的道路是什么？

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the last 16
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）了解英格兰队在晋级16强后需要做些什么才能进入决赛

title.en: Argentina avoid biggest World Cup upset with extra-time win vs Cape Verde
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷对佛得角的加时赛胜利避免了世界杯最大的沮丧

summary.en: Argentina avoided the biggest upset in World Cup history after Diney Borges' own-goal in extra-time rescued a 3-2 win over Cape Verde to book their place in the last 16 of the tournament.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷队避免了世界杯历史上最大的挫折，因为Diney Borges在加时赛中的进球以3-2战胜佛得角队，在比赛的最后16场比赛中预定了自己的位置。

title.en: Arias strike sends Colombia into World Cup last 16
title.zh-CN: 阿里亚斯罢工让哥伦比亚队在最后16场比赛中进入世界杯

summary.en: Colombia reached the last 16 of the World Cup for the third time in their last three appearances at the tournament with a 1-0 win over Ghana.
summary.zh-CN: 哥伦比亚在锦标赛的最后三场比赛中第三次进入世界杯的最后16场比赛，以1-0战胜加纳。

title.en: Colombia beat Ghana to reach last 16 LIVE!
title.zh-CN: 哥伦比亚击败加纳，直播次数达到最后16次！

title.en: Cape Verde threaten shock for the ages before Argentina break hearts in World Cup classic
title.zh-CN: 在阿根廷在世界杯经典赛中心碎之前，佛得角威胁要震惊一段时间

summary.en: What a game, what a series of moments, what a display of spirit and skill from Cape Verde, a tiny island nation with a far-flung diaspora team, who took Argentina right to the brink of one of the...
summary.zh-CN: 这是一场多么精彩的比赛，一连串的时刻，来自佛得角的精神和技巧的展示，佛得角是一个小岛国，拥有一支广阔的侨民团队，他们将阿根廷带到了一个...

title.en: Jhon Arias goal sends Colombia into last 16 as Ghana bow out of World Cup
title.zh-CN: 随着加纳退出世界杯， Jhon Arias的进球让哥伦比亚队进入了最后16名

summary.en: Ghana can only have feared the worst when Luis Suárez’s number came up in the seventh minute. A day on from the 16th anniversary of one of the most infamous episodes in World Cup history, the...
summary.zh-CN: 只有当路易斯·苏亚雷斯（ Luis Suárez ）的号码在第七分钟出现时，加纳才会担心最糟糕的情况。世界杯历史上最臭名昭著的剧集之一16周年纪念日的一天，...

title.en: Rice likely to be available for England v Mexico
title.zh-CN: 大米可能适用于英格兰v墨西哥

summary.en: Declan Rice is likely to be available to start England's World Cup tie against Mexico despite an ongoing injury issue.
summary.zh-CN: 尽管伤病问题持续存在，德克兰·赖斯仍有可能参加英格兰世界杯对阵墨西哥的比赛。

title.en: England fan tickets for Mexico on resale for up to £26K
title.zh-CN: 转售墨西哥英格兰球迷票高达£ 26,000

summary.en: Tickets originally bought by England fans for the World Cup last-16 game against Mexico are relisted for thousands of pounds on Fifa's official resale portal.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰球迷最初为世界杯最后16场对阵墨西哥的比赛购买的门票在国际足联的官方转售门户网站上以数千英镑的价格重新上市。

title.en: Egypt into last 16 after shootout victory against Australia

summary.en: Egypt defeated Australia on penalties to claim their first ever win in the World Cup knockout stage and set up a last-16 tie with either Argentina or Cape Verde.

title.en: 'I decided last minute!' - Salah on Panenka penalty

summary.en: Mo Salah explains it was a last-minute decision to "Panenka" his penalty for Egypt after they beat Australia in a shootout to progress to the last 16 of the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Germany want Klopp talks as Nagelsmann resigns

summary.en: The German football association is seeking talks with Jurgen Klopp about becoming their men's national team coach after Julian Nagelsmann resigned.

title.en: Ex-Spurs boss Postecoglou takes over at Ronaldo's Al-Nassr

summary.en: Former Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou is appointed as head coach of Al-Nassr in the Saudi Pro League - where he will manage Cristiano Ronaldo.

title.en: After World Cup goals are last year's signings finally set to deliver for Newcastle?

summary.en: Anthony Elanga and Yoane Wissa both struggled in their first season at Newcastle, but five goals between at the World Cup them suggest things will be different next term.

title.en: Arsenal sign Lioness Stanway from Bayern

summary.en: England midfielder Georgia Stanway says she is joining Arsenal to "win trophies and grow as a player".

title.en: Watch the full shootout as Egypt hold nerve to make World Cup last 16

summary.en: Egypt defeat Australia on penalties to claim their first ever win in the World Cup knockout stage, and make it through to the last 16.

title.en: 'History for the Pharaohs' - Egypt celebrate after winning shootout

summary.en: Egypt celebrate as they win a World Cup knockout match for the first time after beating Australia 4-2 on penalties in Dallas to reach the last 16.

title.en: Ashour heads Egypt into lead against Australia

summary.en: Emam Ashour heads Egypt into the lead against Australia in their 2026 World Cup round of 32 match in Dallas.

title.en: 'You can't breathe' - what is it like playing at altitude?

summary.en: BBC pundits Rachel Corsie and Lucas Leiva explain their experiences of playing football at altitude, ahead of England's game at Estadio Azteca against Mexico which sits 2,240 metres above sea level.

title.en: Portugal through to last 16 after dramatic victory over Croatia

summary.en: Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 with goals from Cristiano Ronaldo and Goncalo Ramos after a chaotic second-half in Toronto to set up a last 16 tie with Iberian rivals Spain.

title.en: The friends who drove from Ghana to the World Cup

summary.en: Six fans of the Black Stars are living proof of how football can drive supporters to extreme lengths to follow their team.

title.en: Late VAR drama as Croatia denied equaliser

summary.en: Josko Gvardiol's stoppage-time goal is ruled out for offside after a VAR review, denying Croatia an equaliser against Portugal in their World Cup knockout match in Toronto.

title.en: Mahrez retires from Algeria duty after World Cup exit

summary.en: Algeria captain Riyad Mahrez announces his retirement from international football after the Desert Foxes’ 2-0 defeat by Switzerland in the World Cup round of 32.

title.en: Victorious Portugal pay emotional tribute to Jota

summary.en: One year after his death, Portugal are using Diogo Jota's memory to help inspire them at the 2026 World Cup.
